title: aira bengalensis
intro: Aira bengalensis, also known as Bengal air grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia and has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Aira bengalensis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, making it a potential natural remedy for various health conditions. The herbal preparations of Aira bengalensis include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be used to treat various ailments, including fever, diarrhea, and skin infections.
